base_size.note: Varies by effect type - particles are 2-4px, speech bubble is 12x10px

shared_attributes.layer: foreground (on top of all other elements)

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Communication bubble that appears when Echo is hungry, displays seed icon to indicate need
context.screen_position: To right of Echo's head at x=80-92px, y=40-50px
context.usage_scenario: Appears when Echo enters hungry state (food bowl empty). Displays continuously while hungry. Contains seed icon (3x3px) to communicate Echo's need for food. Disappears when player feeds Echo.

visual_specification.shape: Rounded rectangular speech bubble. 12px wide, 10px tall. 1px outline in dark blue. Small tail/pointer (2x2px) extending toward Echo's head on left side.
visual_specification.texture: Pure pixel art, simple and clean

animation.description: Static bubble that appears/disappears instantly (no animation). Contains static seed icon (3x3px) centered inside.

visual_specification.details: Bubble: 12x10px rectangle with 1px #1D2B53 outline, #FFF1E8 fill. Tail: 2x2px triangle pointing left toward Echo. Seed icon: 3x3px #FFA300 oval centered in bubble at x=84-86px, y=44-46px (relative to bubble position). Positioned at x=80px, y=40px (top-left corner).

relationships.shared_with: Contains seed icon (same as seed item asset)
relationships.differences_from: Unlike particles: static (no movement), persists during state (not temporary), contains icon (not pure shape), has outline stroke.

explicit_negations: No rounded corners beyond pixel limitations
No thought bubble style (speech bubble only)
